footnotes: Large consistent effect across formulations; 7 double-blind RCTs; I2=12-49%; all point estimates favour G-CSF; dose-response relationship observed
Downgraded 1 level: some open-label head-to-head comparisons in the broader evidence base inform indirect estimates; direct evidence from 3 RCTs with I2=0% but all in breast cancer only
Downgraded 2 levels: serious imprecision (wide CI crossing 1.0; OIS not met; only 2 studies); limited to breast cancer population; cannot exclude clinically meaningful difference in either direction

Downgraded 2 levels: only 2 studies (Timmer-Bonte 2005; Doorduijn 2003) reported OS; serious imprecision with CI including both benefit and harm; both open-label; insufficient events for reliable estimate
Downgraded 1 level: serious imprecision (rare events; CI crosses 1.0 marginally); event rates very low in both arms (<2%); direction of effect consistent with FN reduction
Downgraded 1 level: 5 open-label studies may inflate hospitalization ascertainment differences; large effect consistent across studies; corroborates primary FN outcome
